subject: Unit 10: sf_sin.s + sf_cos.s — mv save/restore optimization
description: Pattern: mv x20,x10; mul x10,x13,x11; mulhu x11,x13,x11; mv x10,x20. Rearrange register allocation to eliminate save/restore mv pairs. Test with: make test-sinf, make test-cosf
activeForm: Optimizing sf_sin.s and sf_cos.s register allocation
